HGSS.056.0000:
Zuki: Yes, this is where we welcome
HO-OH.\f
When the dance we practiced for many
days becomes one with the sound of the\r
Clear Bell we entrusted to you,\f
then HO-OH shall come down from the
great arch of the sky once again!\f
HGSS.056.0001:
This is all we can do for you...
What you do now is entirely up to you...
HGSS.056.0002:
That IS indeed HO-OH...
The guardian of the sky around here\r
from ancient times...\f
So many have tried and tried, only
to fail...\f
[0103,0000,0000], your heart and the Clear
Bell in harmony have finally made\r
it appear...\f
HGSS.056.0003:
[0103,0000,0000], don’t you see?\f
HO-OH must have been waiting for
someone like you all this time.\r
Wouldn’t you agree...?\f
HGSS.056.0005:
You have done a great job.
Say hello to Professor Elm for us.
HGSS.056.0006:
You have not only made HO-OH appear,
but you have also caught it...\f
You are so wonderful.
There is nothing more for us to say.\f
Take good care of yourself in
your journey...
HGSS.056.0007:
If that is what you believe, we will not
try to convince you otherwise.\f
Still, if you want to see HO-OH once
more, perhaps you can come back here\r
after everything has been settled...
HGSS.056.0008:
I think when you turn your back to it,
HO-OH will not come back for\r
some time...\f
If you want to see HO-OH, perhaps you
can come back here after everything\r
has been settled...
